title: cordia longipetiolata
intro: Cordia longipetiolata, also known as the Cordia tree, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Bignoniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cordia longipetiolata include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Cordia longipetiolata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
